title: Dendrophthoe graciliflora
intro: Dendrophthoe graciliflora, also known as the slender mistletoe, is a hemiparasitic plant species that obtains its nutrients by connecting to the vascular system of its host tree. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and inflammation, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Dendrophthoe graciliflora include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which may contribute to its medicinal effects. In traditional herbal medicine, Dendrophthoe graciliflora is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, as well as to boost the immune system.
